instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Joining a sports club
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I want to join a sports club this term, and I thought you might like to join one too. [1]Would you prefer basketball or swimming?[/1]||[2]The club meets twice a week. Is that too often for you?[/2]||[3]What day is best for you to go?[/3] I’m free on Mondays and Thursdays.||[4]Do you think we should ask Jack to join us?[/4]||Write back soon||Tom

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Tom,||Thanks for your message. [1]I’d prefer swimming because I already play basketball at school, and I’d like to try something different this term.[/1]||[2]No, meeting twice a week isn’t too often for me because I want to get fitter and I usually have free time after school.[/2]||[3]Thursday is the best day for me because I visit my grandparents on Mondays.[/3]||[4]Yes, I think we should ask Jack to join us, but we should tell him soon because the club may become full.[/4]||See you later,||Chris
